title: In-Home Caregiver
shift: Part-time and full-time shifts available, including weekends and evenings
required_qualifications: Valid driver's license and reliable transportation
Current CPR and First Aid certification
Negative TB test within the last 12 months
At least 1 year of caregiving experience
Ability to pass a background check
responsibilities: Assist clients with activities of daily living
Prepare meals and perform light housekeeping
Accompany clients to appointments and errands
hard_requirements: Must be at least 18 years old
Negative TB test within the last 12 months
